portfolio_metadata.description: Synthetic AI use case portfolio for BFSI and Healthcare enterprise adoption assessment. Used to demonstrate multi-agent evaluation and portfolio prioritization. All entities are fictional composites.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted procurement operations for indirect spend
use_cases.description: Deploy an AI system to review vendor contracts, flag pricing anomalies, and recommend consolidation opportunities across indirect spend categories.

use_cases.title: Automated KYC document verification
use_cases.description: AI system to extract and verify identity documents during customer onboarding, reducing manual review time.
use_cases.vendor: Third-party KYC platform with LLM add-on

use_cases.title: Claims triage and fraud flagging
use_cases.description: AI model to triage incoming insurance claims and flag patterns consistent with historical fraud cases for human review.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted clinical documentation for outpatient visits
use_cases.description: Ambient AI system to draft clinical notes from physician-patient conversations during outpatient consultations.

use_cases.title: Procurement of clinical supplies with demand forecasting
use_cases.description: AI-driven demand forecasting for clinical supplies to reduce stockouts and overordering across hospital network.
use_cases.vendor: Internal build on existing supply chain platform

use_cases.title: AI-based prior authorization triage
use_cases.description: AI system to pre-screen prior authorization requests against payer policy documents to accelerate approvals.
regulatory_exposure: CMS guidance on AI in coverage decisions

use_cases.title: Loan underwriting document summarization
use_cases.description: AI system to summarize financial statements and supporting documents for commercial loan underwriters.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted vendor risk assessment for procurement
use_cases.description: AI system to screen new vendors against sanctions lists, financial health indicators, and past performance data.
